user.title: Tibber Configuration
user.description: Configure the Tibber entities for electricity prices and consumption metering.

data.tibber_prices_entity: Tibber prices overview sensor (optional, leave empty to use price sensor)
data.tibber_pulse_consumption_entity: Tibber Pulse consumption sensor (current power drawn from grid)
data.tibber_pulse_production_entity: Tibber Pulse production sensor (current power fed into grid)
data.solar_forecast_entity: Solar forecast sensor (optional, e.g. Forecast.Solar or Solcast)
data.solar_forecast_entities: Additional solar forecast sensors (optional, for multiple arrays/services)
data.solar_power_entity: Solar power sensor (optional, current production in W)
data.solar_energy_today_entity: Solar energy today sensor (optional, daily kWh for forecast calibration)
data.epex_predictor_enabled: Enable EPEX Predictor (extends price forecast beyond Tibber day-ahead)

devices.title: Device Configuration
devices.description: Configure the chargers and the controllable inverter. Select all charger switches and set the default power per charger.

data.inverter_feed_power_entity: Feed inverter power entity (optional, for zero-feed control)
data.inverter_feed_actual_power_entity: Feed inverter actual power sensor (optional, current output)

battery.title: Battery Configuration
battery.description: Configure battery parameters and price thresholds.

data.battery_soc_entity: Battery state of charge sensor (SOC in %)
data.price_low_threshold: Low price threshold (ct/kWh) - charge below this
data.price_high_threshold: High price threshold (ct/kWh) - discharge above this
data.house_consumption_w: Average house consumption (W) - used for planning
data.battery_cycle_cost: Battery cycle cost (ct/kWh) - degradation cost per charge/discharge

init.title: Tibber & Solar Configuration
init.description: Adjust Tibber entities and solar forecast sensors.

data.solar_power_entity: Solar power sensor (optional, current production in W)
data.solar_energy_today_entity: Solar energy today sensor (optional, daily kWh for forecast calibration)
data.epex_predictor_enabled: Enable EPEX Predictor (extends forecast beyond Tibber)

devices.title: Device Configuration
devices.description: Adjust chargers and inverter settings. The power value applies to newly added chargers; existing chargers keep their power.

battery.title: Battery Configuration
battery.description: Adjust battery parameters and price thresholds.
